REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, OTHER AMY HARRINGTON NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF REFEREES FINAL REPORT OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 531 BOWDOIN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, PURSUANT TO DEFAULT INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT FOR PARTITION DATED 9-11-2024 AND FOR APPROVAL OF REFEREE FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED AS REQUESTED. Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Text Ruling

Amy Harrington Esq., Harrington Law, 415-558-7700, via zoom, Partition Referee

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Continued To Apr-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing For Default Interlocutory Judgment For Partition Of Real Property And Appointment Of Referee Pursuant To Lrsf 6.6(D)(7)(A)
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default interlocutory judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:13 am and concluding at 9:49 am.

Plaintiff Susan Yang Lau is present via zoom video conference represented by Ryan Jun Mau, Esq., placed under oath and testifies. Plaintiff is assisted by Cantonese Language interpreter Jessica Yu, Certification # 301798.
Defendant Zhen Lim not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits from the Declaration of Chui Lim for the Court's review:
Exhibit F: Grant Deed
Exhibit G: Quick Claim Deed
Exhibit H: Assessor Recording
Exhibit J: Referee Credentials
Exhibit K: Referee Fee Schedule

COURT FINDS:
1. The Verified Complaint filed Oct-16-2023 is the operative pleading.
2. The Complaint was personally served on Defendant Shufen Yu on Nov-11-2023
3. The Complaint was personally served on Defendant Zhen Lim on Nov-14-2023
4. Default against Defendants Zhen Lim and Shufen Yu entered on Dec-26-2023
5. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on Jul-16-2024

The Court further finds that the ownership intrest of the property in intrest located at 531 Bowdoin Street, San Francisco, CA 94134, Assessor's Parcel Number 5931-023, is as follows:

1. Susan Lau Ownes: 25%
2. Chui Lim Ownes: 25%
3. Zhen Lim and Shufen Yu as trustees of the Lim Famly Trust Own: 50% jointly

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs Susan Lau and Chui Lim and against Defendants Zhen Lim and Shufen Yu GRANTING the request for Interlocutory Judgment, and appointment of a referee.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.(D505)
